bio.title: About Me
bio.description_1: I am a developer focused on the MERN Stack, passionate about creating software architecture that is as clean as it is functional.
bio.description_2: My approach goes beyond just 'writing code'; it's about solving complex problems through scalable solutions, always prioritizing 'user experience and performance'.
